AdditionalAttributes.description: Bold, tangy, and delightfully zesty—our Lime & Cracked Pepper Cheddar Cheese is a unique twist on a classic favourite. This smooth, rich cheddar is perfectly complemented by the bright citrus notes of lime and the bold, aromatic bite of cracked black pepper. Whether you’re snacking, crafting the perfect cheese board, or adding a kick to your favourite dishes, this cheese brings a flavourful punch that elevates any moment. It’s the perfect balance of creamy, spicy, and refreshing—a true gourmet experience in every bite.

AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Discover Alannah's Dip Mexican Chilli Jalapeno & Habanero Hommus. It offers a bold, fiery twist for sharing. Available at Woolworths online.
AdditionalAttributes.description:
At the heart of our hummus is family.


Alannah’s Dips were born in our kitchen, inspired by the laughter, chaos, and connection that come with raising a family. Named after our daughter, Alannah, this dip is a celebration of togetherness—of those joyful, messy, meaningful moments shared over food.


Our Mexican Chilli Jalapeño and Habanero Hommus brings the creaminess of our authentic hommus with a bold, fiery twist. Jalapeño and green habanero add a vibrant, spicy zing that’s balanced, addictive and seriously moreish. It’s a dip that brings excitement to the table and keeps you coming back for more.


We believe the best food comes from real ingredients and real care. That’s why every tub of Alannah’s is made with premium, wholesome ingredients and garnished with love.


And because we care deeply about the planet we’re leaving for our kids, our packaging is made from responsibly sourced paper—to help reduce plastic waste and tread a little lighter on the earth.


Welcome to our table.
